snippet.title: Ve Junoon | Awarapan 2 | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Mithoon, Sayeed Q., Subodhh
snippet.description:
Phir ishq karne chala kyun?
 
Beginning the musical journey of ‘Awarapan 2’, ‘Ve Junoon’ is composed by Mithoon, sung by Subodhh Sharma and penned by Sayeed Quadri. Featuring Emraan Hashmi and Disha Patani in the video, this song is yearning in its purest form.
 
#VeJunoon #Awarapan2 #EmraanHashmi #DishaPatani #Mithoon #SayeedQuadri #SubodhhSharma
 
Song Composed and Arranged by Mithoon
Lyrics: Sayeed Quadri
Singer: Subodhh Sharma
Song Creative Head: Anugrah
Music Production: Godswill Mergulhão
Music Assistants: Anugrah, Godswill Mergulhão, Eli Rodrigues & Kaushal Gohil
Guitars: Kalyan Baruah
Violin: Jitu Thakur
Backing Vocals: Abhishek Nailwal, Mihir Sharma & Kaustubh More
Recorded at Livingwater Music by A Manivannan
Song Mixed & Mastered by Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mixing Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai
Music Head Vishesh Films: Rohit Saini
 
Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar
 
Vishesh Films & Mukesh Bhatt Present
A Vishesh Bhatt Production
 
AWARAPAN 2
Produced By Vishesh Bhatt
Directed By Nitin Kakkar
Director of Photography Vishnu Rao
Editor Devendra Murdeshwar
Production Designer Teena Paradkar
Choreographer Mudassar Khan
 
Theatrical Distribution Pen Marudhar
In Cinemas 14th August 2026
 
Lyrics:

Intro
 
Chaha tha tune jisse Paaya kabhi na usse
 
Tujhko toh sab hai pataa, aye dil Saari khabar hai tujhe
 
Banjar hui hai aankhen Veeran hai ye saansen
Ab meri rooh ko na jalaa...naa jalaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil lutne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye Phir Ishq karne chala kyun…
 
( Music )
 
OOOOOOOOOO.. OOOOOOOOOO..
 
Verse 1
 
Dekha hai pehle kahin Aisa laga kyun usse
 
Shaayad mere dard se kahin Waqif laga woh mujhe
 
Marham laga zakhmon pe Raahat mili kuchh phirse
Dil ko sukoon milaa..haan milaaaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun, haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun…
 
(Music)
 
Tararareiyeee yeeeeee…
 
Verse 2
 
Aisi koi daastaan
Hai dil main uske kahin Zikr woh jiska kabhi magar Khud se bhi karta nahin
 
Rakhta chhupa ke sabse Bhulaa hai jaise rakh ke
Kal woh kahin apna…..apnaaa Aage hai teri marzi
 
Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun….haaye
 
Phir ishq karne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junooooooooooooooo Oooooooooo Oooooooooo Ooooooooooo
Ve Junooooooooooooooo Oooooooooo Oooooooooo Ooooooooooo
 
Dil ishq karne chalaa kyun Hmmmmmm…..
Phir ishq karne chalaa kyun

Rhaenyra vs Alicent Scenes. Rhaenyra Iron Throne. Ormund Hightower's plan to steal the Dragonseeds Hugh Hammer Vermithor. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 5 Footage. Aegon and Sunfyre at Rooks Rest.

House Stark, Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Connection to Dunk and Egg. The Isle of Faces, God's Eye, Green Men, Daemon & Rhaenyra Arc, Daeron Targaryen, Ormund Hightower, Cregan Stark, Roderick Dustin and the Stark Army Winter Wolves. Black Alys Alysanne Blackwood. Daemon & Rhaenyra. The Fall of King's Landing, Battle Of The Gullet, other major battles. Aemond at Harrenhal. Daemon vs Aemond, The Gods Eye, Helaena Dragon Dreams, Daemon Visions, Three Eyed Raven. The Fake Daeron Targaryen Explained.

Why Alys Rivers wants Aemond. House Of The Dragon Season 2 Episode 8 Finale Aftermath and Ending Explained. Daemon Sees Daenerys Targaryen, all of Daemon's Weirwood Visions. The Three Eyed Raven Brynden Rivers, The Bloodraven. Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Trailer connection. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Teaser. Rhaenyra on the Iron Throne. Helaena Dragon Dreams upgrade.

New History and Lore, Vermithor, Silverwing, Dragonseeds, Hugh Hammer, Ulf White, Seasmoke Addam Hull, Sheepstealer, Daeron Tessarion. Alys Rivers. Why Daemon and Rhaenyra Take King's Landing, Fall of King's Landing. How they trick Aemond and Vhagar.

Riverlands Battle, House Stark Returns, Cregan Stark Easter Eggs. House Tully. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episodes. Vermithor, Arrax Lucerys Dragon, Moondancer Baela, Rhaena Sheepstealer, Aegon II Sunfyre, Helaena Targaryen Dreamfyre. Helaena Targaryen Dragon Dreams and how she tells the future. Aegon The Conqueror and Valyria Explained. Daemon Targaryen and Vermithor Explained. Dance of The Dragons Trailer and A Song of Ice And Fire Book Easter Eggs. Jon Snow Daenerys Targaryen Family History and Lore.

More House of the Dragon Season 3 and Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms  Season 2 videos soon. And the Aegon's Conquest Movie!

snippet.title: 《功夫女足》公佈演員名單預告片 周六內地上映力爭暑假首段票房
snippet.description:
《功夫女足》公佈演員名單預告片 周六內地上映力爭暑假首段票房

周星馳 自編自導嘅最新作品《功夫女足》，早前事先張揚將隨時突擊上映後，星期一正式宣布新片鐵定於7月11日公映，同時公佈嘅演出名單當中，亦可見包括主演包括 張小斐 迪麗熱巴 以及男星 張藝興，仲包括香港觀眾熟悉嘅 劉嘉玲 蔡思貝 張繼聰、歐陽靖 (MC Jin)，近年以楝篤笑聞名嘅 歐陽萬成 鄧月平 亦出現名單之中，另外日本男星 佐藤健 同 舞蹈組合 AVANTGARDEY 亦參與其中。

據指《功夫女足》講述「娥眉隊」女子足球隊，以傳統少林功夫融入現代足球，一路逆襲奪冠嘅故事。

除中港日明星陣容之外，據傳新片仲會出現韓國國寶級影帝 宋康昊 出演裁判，而前國家女足球主將 趙麗娜、李佳悅 亦會出演兼擔任技術指導，仲有傳聞指多位《少林足球》成員將客串驚喜現身。

周星馳 自編自導嘅最新作品《功夫女足》，早前事先張揚將隨時突擊上映後，星期一正式宣布新片鐵定於7月11日公映，同時公佈嘅演出名單當中，亦可見包括主演包括 張小斐 迪麗熱巴 以及男星 張藝興，仲包括香港觀眾熟悉嘅 劉嘉玲 蔡思貝 張繼聰、歐陽靖 (MC Jin)，近年以楝篤笑聞名嘅 歐陽萬成 鄧月平 亦出現名單之中，另外日本男星 佐藤健 同 舞蹈組合 AVANTGARDEY 亦參與其中。

據指《功夫女足》講述「娥眉隊」女子足球隊，以傳統少林功夫融入現代足球，一路逆襲奪冠嘅故事。

除中港日明星陣容之外，據傳新片仲會出現韓國國寶級影帝 宋康昊 出演裁判，而前國家女足球主將 趙麗娜、李佳悅 亦會出演兼擔任技術指導，仲有傳聞指多位《少林足球》成員將客串驚喜現身。

snippet.title: Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
♫ Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love (Lyrics)
⭐ Download/Stream: 

🎤 Lyrics: Pitbull, Chris Brown - International Love

[Intro: Pitbull, Chris Brown]
Went from Mr. 305 (Dade County)
To Mr. Worldwide (All around the world, ayy, ayy)
And now we're international, so international (Oh, yeah)
International (Woo), so international

[Verse 1: Pitbull]
You can't catch me, boy (Can't catch me, boy)
I'm overseas at about a hundred G's per show
Don't test me, boy (Don't test me, boy)
'Cause I rap with the best for sure
305 'til the death of me (Yeah)
Cremate my body, let the ocean have what's left of me (Uh-huh)
But for now, forget about that
Blow the whistle, baby, you the referee, dale
[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City, I never sleep (Yeah)
Wild like Los Angeles, my fantasy (Chris Brown, woo)
Hotter than Miami, I-I-I feel the heat (Oh yeah)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Girl, it's), it's international love (International, oh-oh)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo!)

[Verse 2: Pitbull]
I don't play football, but I've touched down everywhere, everywhere? Everywhere (Dale)
I don't play baseball, but I've hit a home run everywhere, everywhere (Dale)
I been to countries and cities I can't pronounce and to places on the globe I ain't know existed (Yeah)
In Romania, she pulled me to the side and told me, "Pit, you can have me and my sister" (Woo)
In Lebanon, yeah, the women are bomb
And in Greece, you guessed it, the women are sweet
Been all around the world, but I ain't gon' lie
There's nothin' like Miami's heat, dale (Woo)
[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City, I never sleep (Yeah)
Wild like Los Angeles, my fantasy (Uh-huh, woo)
Hotter than Miami, I-I-I feel the heat (Woo, oh, yeah)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Girl, it's), it's international love (We're international, oh-oh, that's right)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo)

[Verse 3: Pitbull]
Down in DR, they're lookin' for visas
I ain't talkin' credit cards, if you know what I mean (¿Qué lo que?)
Y en Cuba, la cosa está dura
But the women get down, if you know what I mean
En Colombia, the women got everythin' done
But they some of the most beautiful women I've ever seen
In Brazil, they're freaky with big ol' booties
And they thongs, blue, yellow, and green
En L.A., tengo la Mexicana
En New York, tengo la boricua (Dale, nena)
Besito' para toda' la' mujere' en Venezuela (Mwah)
Y en Miami, tengo a cualquiera (Woo)

[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City (Hey), I never sleep
Wild like Los Angeles (Oh-woah), my fantasy (Woo)
Hotter than Miami (You're hotter than Miami), I-I-I feel the heat
Oh-oh-oh-oh (All around the world), it's international love (International, oh-oh)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo)
[Bridge: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
There's not a place
That your love don't affect me, baby
So don't ever change
I'll cross the globe when I'm with you, baby
Hey (Chris Brown)
Oh-woah (This for the women worldwide, that's right, woo)

[Chorus: Chris Brown, Pitbull]
You put it down like New York City (Woo), I never sleep (212)
Wild like Los Angeles (L.A., L.A.), my fantasy (310)
Hotter than Miami (You're hotter than Miami), I-I-I feel the heat (305)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah, woo), it's international love (We're international, international love, that's right)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Yeah), it's international love (Woo)
You put it down like (Down) New York City, I never sleep (Woo, 212)
Wild like Los Angeles (Los Angeles), my fantasy (310)
Hotter than Miami, I-I-I feel the heat (Oh, yeah, 305)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Woo, oh), it's international love (International, oh)
Oh-oh-oh-oh (Oh-oh), it's international love (Woo)

[Outro: Chris Brown, Chris Brown & Pitbull, Pitbull]
Oh-oh-oh (You're international, so international)
Oh-oh-oh (You're international, so international)
Oh-oh-oh (You're international, so international)
Woah-woah-oh, woah-woah-oh, international love (Surrounded by beautiful girls, yeah, yeah)
Woah-woah-oh, woah-woah-oh, international love
